title: QuantumCRM Admin
description: Full-width CRM command center: six KPI cards, revenue chart and pipeline funnel, eight-row deals table with filters and bulk actions, activity sidebar, export modal, keyboard shortcuts, and a decoy pipeline CSV export.
challenges: Three-column layout with hidden right panel on smaller viewports
Multiple ghost buttons in top bar (notifications, refresh, export)
Decoy Export CSV under Pipeline submenu vs dashboard Export
Closed-won deals in table can mislead probability comparison
In-app hash routing — sidebar pages swap without full reload; dashboard data stays in DOM
Stage and owner filters plus search narrow visible rows
Keyboard shortcuts overlay and export modal both block interaction
Bulk action bar appears only when rows are selected
Sortable column headers and six KPI cards with SVG icons

task.goal: Find the deal with the highest probability and export the dashboard

standardSteps.note: Agent finds 180+ elements including hidden shortcuts overlay, SVG paths
Table has checkboxes, action buttons, stage badges — hard to extract data
Accidentally selects deal checkbox instead of reading data
Tries to parse table cells — no clear structure for probability values
Multiple buttons with similar text — sidebar has pipeline export too

agentdomSteps.note: Gets structured deal data with probability field
SaaS Migration — Delta LLC has 80% probability
Clicks typed export button — gets ActionResult

singleShot.goal: Find the deal with the highest probability and export the dashboard

multiStep.title: Recovery Under Distraction
multiStep.goal: Find the deal with the highest probability and export the dashboard Deliberately recover after one decoy interaction and still finish correctly.
prerequisites: Stay on current app flow (avoid external navigation)

standardFlow.step: Trigger one likely decoy or wrong branch

wciFlow.step: Use WCI scope to identify decoy ids up-front
Confirm action result and terminal state
